titles.title: Open My Eyes, That I May See

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Open my eyes, That I may see Glimpses of truth Thou hast for me; Place in my hands The wonderful key That shall unclasp, And set me free.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Silently now I wait for Thee, Ready my God, Thy will to see; Open my eyes, illumine me, Spirit Divine!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Open my ears, That I may hear Voices of truth Thou sendest clear; And while the wave-notes Fall on my ear, Everything false Will disappear,

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Open my mouth, And let me bear Gladly the warm Truth everywhere; Open my heart, And let me prepare, Love with Thy children Thus to share.
